title: Afterimage Gate
prompt: Instrumental only. A 46-second electro-ambient focus study at 100 BPM. Use a soft but present low kick, syncopated brushed digital percussion, airy marimba-like synth notes, a rounded sub pulse, and a slowly opening ultraviolet pad. It should feel elegant, magnetic, and slightly cinematic without becoming dramatic. Structure: a quiet gate opening, a delicate rhythmic pattern, one color-rich harmonic bloom, then a soft afterimage release. No vocals, no lo-fi, no piano, no Rhodes, no vinyl crackle, no trap hats, no trailer impacts, no EDM build-up or drop, no harsh high end.
